title: Mission Match Quiz
subtitle: 4 questions to find your ideal MOS path

questions.text: What type of work excites you most?

answers.text: Physical action and leading in the field

questions.text: How would your friends describe you?

answers.text: Bold, decisive, and a natural leader
Organized, reliable, and a great coordinator

questions.text: What do you want your civilian career to look like?

answers.text: Law enforcement, firefighting, or emergency services
Airline pilot, mechanic, or aviation industry
Logistics, supply chain, or operations management

questions.text: What matters most to you in your Guard service?

answers.text: Being on the front lines, protecting the mission
Saving lives and supporting soldier health
Operating aircraft and supporting air operations

combat.label: Combat Arms
combat.desc: You're mission-oriented, decisive, and built for action. Combat Arms roles put you at the forefront of military operations.

intel.label: Intelligence & Cyber
intel.desc: You think critically and love technology. Intelligence and Cyber roles offer cutting-edge work with national security impact.

medical.label: Medical
medical.desc: You're driven to help others. Medical MOS careers build elite healthcare skills while serving soldiers in the field and in garrison.

engineer.label: Engineering
engineer.desc: You're hands-on and mechanically gifted. Engineering roles build real infrastructure skills that translate directly to civilian trades.

aviation.label: Aviation
aviation.desc: You're drawn to the sky. Aviation roles offer elite training on attack helicopters, unmanned systems, and fixed-wing aircraft.

logistics.label: Logistics & Support
logistics.desc: You keep operations running. Logistics and support roles build management, coordination, and operations skills for civilian careers.
